allow: Bash(git commit -m 'feat: adversarial defense workflow system *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: inline evaluation loop, stream per-attack metrics in real-time *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: use display attack names as metrics keys, fix relative imports *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: accuracy to 2 decimal places, use full dataset size as sample_count *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: support multiple attack/defense nodes connected to same model *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: connection handles now properly restrict connect direction *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: move source handles from Right to Bottom to prevent snap ambiguity *)
Bash(git commit -m 'refactor: Left=input Right=output only, remove Top/Bottom handles *)
